framework: vLLM (PUBLIC wheel vllm==0.24.0 — first official release carrying DeepEPV2All2AllManager; merge e2f993dc is an ancestor)
arm: deepep-vllm-epnc1 (EP_NUM_COMMS=1 = pure public-root arm; no fork multi-comm overlay in play)
topology: 2x p5en.48xlarge H200, EP16 = TP1 x DP16 (8 local ranks per node), model Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-FP8
transport: DeepEP V2 ElasticBuffer over NCCL-GIN v2 CPU-proxy (NCCL_GIN_TYPE=2, OFI_NCCL_GIN_GDAKI=0), aws-ofi-nccl 9c44 v1-fallback plugin (gdrdrv-2.4 kernel nodes)
baseline_note: campaign 2026-06-20 vLLM conc4 ~38.5 agg_tps was the EPNC=8 multi-comm arm on the private fork build; this EPNC=1 run (~19.5 at c4) is the single-comm baseline arm — consistent with the documented ~2.09x multi-comm win. EPNC=8 requires the fork-only multi-comm overlay (named GAP, PATCH-DELTA).
